name: 10_chip-with-trailing-content
description: The canonical bug-trigger case from the planning doc: '@CHIEF_DESIGNER hello world'. A command-kind mention chip followed immediately by content. tokenForMention({kind:'command'}) emits '@CHIEF_DESIGNER ' (trailing space included), so the round-trip must preserve exactly one space between the chip's serialisation and the following text — no doubling, no ' ', no swallowed space.
